calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-20-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER 931 SANCHEZ STREET LLC'S MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DENIED. No proof of service re: judgment debtor Legacy United Capital Investments, Inc. Additionally, counsel for Petitioner, 931 Sanchez Steet LLC (Richard Veres of Nichols, Catterton, Downing & Reed), states in his declaration at paragraph 6 that "Lina Lu, .., is married to Patrick [Lin]" and attaches the declaration of Ms. Lu as evidence in support of the motion. Said declaration refences case 931 Sanchez Street, LLC v. Legacy United Capital Investments Inc. et. al., CGC-25-624806. In that case, counsel for Plaintiff, 931 Sanchez Steet LLC (James Reed of Nichols, Catterton, Downing & Reed), states in paragraph 20 of the amended verified complaint that "It appears from record title that defendant PATRICK LIN and his wife BI SHAN LIN are one-half (1/2) owners of the property. However, it is unknown whether defendant BI SHAN LIN is claiming separate property title or community property title in the property." A person by the name "Lina Lu" is listed as a separate defendant in CGC-25-624806, i.e. not the same person as BI SHAN LIN. (See paragraphs 6 and 7 of the amended verified complaint). Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Judgment

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-04-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Emily Brough, 415.956.8100 for Plainitff/Moving party 931 Sanchez Street LLC.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER 931 SANCHEZ STREET LLC Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is GRANTED. Moving party sustained its burden. No opposition filed. Order and judgment signed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
